notes: Basic structure exists but barrel physics are erratic, platform collision is unreliable causing player to fall through, ladders are hard to grab, and the visual representation barely resembles classic Donkey Kong with no proper girder layout or recognizable sprites.
Core logic is present but a fatal flaw prevents the player from jumping more than once per page load, and barrels roll uphill due to mismatched slope logic.

The build runs and basic movement/jumping/climbing/barrels/stages exist, but Donkey Kong authenticity is limited and several mechanics/layout choices feel simplified or inaccurate enough to keep it around mediocre overall.
